Interface IMedia

All Known Implementing Classes:
DigitalMedia, EBook
public interface IMedia
Interface defining contracts for digital media properties. Implemented by classes that represent digital content (e.g., E-Books). REFACTORING IMPROVEMENTS: ✓ Added comprehensive JavaDoc documentation ✓ Removed redundant 'public' modifiers (interfaces are public by default) ✓ Improved method naming clarity

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getMediaID()
    Returns the unique media identifier.
    double
    getSizeMB()
    Returns the file size in megabytes.
    String
    getURL()
    Returns the URL or download link for the digital media.

  • Method Details

    • getMediaID

      Returns the unique media identifier.
      Returns:
      Media ID

    • getURL

      String getURL()
      Returns the URL or download link for the digital media.
      Returns:
      Media URL

    • getSizeMB

      double getSizeMB()
      Returns the file size in megabytes.
      Returns:
      File size in MB
